meta.source: Euromonitor Passport 2026 (Soft Drinks, Total category volume from Retail Channels report)
meta.note: Per-capita = ml*1e6/population. Compute in-app with live World Bank population (SP.POP.TOTL). csd_sugar = Carbonates TOTAL (regular+low-calorie; not split). rtd_tea_unsweet = RTD Tea TOTAL (sweet+unsweet; not split).
